title: Moonlit Dreams
meta_description: Luna discovers a magical paintbrush, bringing art to life under the full moon.

prompts.featured: Generate a wide-angle landscape shot of a small village under the light of a full moon, with a young girl standing in the center, holding a magical paintbrush and surrounded by vibrant, glowing artwork that seems to come alive in the moonlight.
prompts.thumbnail: Create a square thumbnail image of Luna's magical paintbrush, with the brush itself glowing softly in the moonlight and surrounded by subtle, swirling patterns of color that evoke a sense of creativity and wonder.
prompts.pinterest: Design a vertical image featuring a dramatic, high-contrast visual of Luna standing in front of a massive, glowing canvas, with the magical paintbrush in hand and a look of inspiration and wonder on her face, surrounded by text overlays that read 'Moonlit Paintbrush Dreams' and 'Where creativity meets magic'.
